title: Evident Repo Manifest
description: Repo-level identity file for any repository in the Evident Technologies ecosystem. Place at repo root as .evident-repo.json.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this repo.

role.description: Ecosystem role. Determines how this repo is categorized and treated.

family.description: Product family this repo belongs to (e.g. 'Evident', 'Tillerstead').

brand.description: Brand identity this repo operates under (e.g. 'evident', 'tillerstead').

packagingStatus.description: How far along the repo is toward clean packaging.

sharedStandardsVersion.description: Version of shared Evident standards this repo follows (e.g. '1.0').

tools.description: IDs of tools registered in ToolHub that live in this repo.

owner.description: Person or team responsible for this repo.

satelliteTier.description: Relationship tier to the main Evident suite. Companions extend the platform mission, ventures serve a different vertical, independents share only governance.

catalogVisibility.description: How this repo appears in catalogs. Published = stable and public. Listed = functional but developing. Draft = owner-only. Archived = historical.

tokenFamily.description: Which foundation token set this repo uses. Determines --ev-* or --ts-* prefix and which foundation CSS file applies.

stackTier.description: Builder support tier for this repo's stack. Computed from the stack field. native = builder generates directly. aware = builder adapts export. prompt = builder assembles AI prompts. metadata = builder stores info only.
